export.done: Written back to configs/. Remember to git commit in the repository.
export.sensitive.title: Export sensitive data?
export.sensitive.body:
Include sensitive data (SSH / GPG private keys, tokens, credentials) and ignore the redaction rules?

[Yes] Export as-is — private keys / tokens are written in plaintext into the config repo; make sure the repo is private!
[No] Capture non-sensitive content only and redact text configs (recommended)
[Cancel] Don't export
export.subtitle: Scan this machine and capture installed-software configs plus environment configs (SSH / GPG / git / Codex / Claude …) back into the repository. Clicking “Capture local config” first asks whether to include sensitive data (redacted by default). Click an item to expand its file path / size / preview.
export.title: Export
